LanguageData.ATC_Msg_EmptyKey: How can I test without an API Key?!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestSuccess: ✅ [Test] Success! AI Core response is good.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestFail: ❌ [Test] Failed! Please check network or API settings.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Init: 🌐 [Init] Reading all mods, building global translation shared pool...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_StartScan: 🚀 Auto Translation Core activated! Target mods: {0}
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipMod: ⏩ [Skip] No Languages or Defs, pure code mod.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FoundMissing: ⚙️ [{0}] Found {1} missing strings! Calling AI for welding...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NoMissing: ✨ [{0}] All parts present, no welding needed.
LanguageData.ATC_FirstTime_Notice: [First Time] Generated translation pack not enabled, auto hot-reload cancelled.
LanguageData.ATC_FirstTime_Dialog:
【First Time Use Notice】

The system detected this is your first time running translation!
The translation pack has been generated locally but is not yet enabled.

Please go to RimWorld's "Mod List", find the mod named "! AutoTranslation AI Pack", [Enable] it and drag it to the [Very Bottom] of the load order, then restart the game.

Next time you translate new mods, the system will trigger language hot-reload directly without restarting!
LanguageData.ATC_ReloadingLog: Executing language hot-reload... The screen may flash, please wait.
LanguageData.ATC_ReloadDoneLog: Hot-reload complete! Latest translations are now fully active.
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_Step1: Select [AI Provider]. We recommend Google (Gemini) for free quotas; DeepSeek is highly recommended for mainland users!
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_Step2: Get an [API Key] from the official site and paste it. If using official API, leave Base URL empty!
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_Step3: Click [🔍 Fetch Model List], then select a model from the dropdown on the right.
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_Step4: Click the green [🚀 Start Auto Translation] button, then go grab a coffee! Or return to the game and keep playing!
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_Step5: 【Must Read for First Use】 After your first translation, a local mod named `! AutoTranslation AI Pack` will be generated. You MUST enable it in the mod list, place it at the very bottom, and restart the game.
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_Q1: Why does fetching the model list keep failing (HTTP 401 / 403)?
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_A1: Usually, your API Key is incorrect, or you copied extra spaces. Also, check if your account quota is depleted.
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_Q2: Why am I getting an HTTP 404 error?
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_A2: If you are using the official API, ensure [Custom Base URL] is completely blank! Only use URLs if you are using a third-party proxy.
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_Q3: What if the translation gets stuck halfway or loses connection?
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_A3: This happens during network jitter or when the AI server is busy. The mod has built-in "Auto-Retry & 5-Min Timeout Protection". If it completely freezes, just restart the game and hit translate again (already translated content will not consume API quota again).
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_Q4: Do I need to restart the game after translating?
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_A4: If it's your "First Time", you must enable the generated `! AutoTranslation AI Pack` and restart. But if the pack is [Already Enabled], the system triggers a "Language Hot-Reload", taking effect in 10 seconds without a restart!
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_Q5: Where are the translated files saved? Can I share them?
LanguageData.ATC_FAQ_A5: They are in your RimWorld/Mods/!Translation_AI_Pack folder! Note that the auto-generated pack is [For Personal Local Use Only] to complete your experience. Please do not pack and share or upload it to Steam Workshop!
LanguageData.ATC_ReloadingCountdown: Translation complete! Reloading game language in
LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_TargetLang: [Target Language]\nSet the language you want the AI to translate foreign mods into.
LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_Provider: [AI Provider]\nSelect the AI model provider. Google (Gemini) or OpenAI are highly recommended.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FetchModelsFail: [System] Failed to fetch list. Please check your API Key.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NetworkRetry: [System] Network jitter or AI server busy, auto-retry mechanism triggered...
